title: dasyglossum longipes
intro: Dasyglossum longipes, also known as a type of club moss, is a plant species belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasyglossum longipes include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
